description: Composition Red shorts made of 100% polyester, with soft elastic waist, adjustable drawcord at waist and branding on right hipFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine wash at 40 degreesComfort in small size, this pair of shorts is a great summer wear. Stylish and comfortable, the polyester fabric wicks away sweat, providing you with dry and fresh comfort and allowing your body to breathe freely. While the elasticated waist sits snug, the drawcord allows you to customise the Fit, making it a perfect wear for indoor and outdoor Sports, as well as for casual and relaxing occasions.
